title: Create: Jaffabricate
description: Make Jaffa Cakes in Minecraft with the power of Create. Build your own Jaffa Factory!
body:
## **Jaffabricate**

Inspired by the Yogscast's classic Youtube series Jaffa Factory and featured in their follow up series Jaffa Factory 2, this little addon for Create lets you make your very own Jaffa Cakes! Make jaffas both big and small, package them up for easier storage and even design ~~ethically questionable~~ breeding programs for sentient orange jellies.

## **Features**

### **Jaffa Cakes**

Once you've cooked up some jaffas their delicious power will grant you the strength of dwarves to mine a larger area.

### **Orange Jelly Slimes**

Create, breed, raise and slaughter orange jelly slimes to increase your jelly yield.

### **Misc**

*   Haunt dyes to change them into their opposing colour
*   Drink orange juice to stave off withering
*   Cut planks into slabs using the mechanical saw ~~(wait seriously? this isn't baseline?!)~~

## **Compatibility**

### **Dependancies**

Requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and it's dependancies.

### **Optional** **Dependancies**

[Create Crafts and Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition) adds some extra functionality and changes a few recipes to prevent duplication.

## **Donations**

We don't accept donations through modrinth but if you're still feeling generous consider donating to one or more of the charities you can find on [www.jinglejam.co.uk](https://www.jinglejam.co.uk/). Even if the event isn't running at the moment a direct donation could help make a big difference!

## **Credits**

### **Code**

Zalgen (aka Uncle Brian)

### **Art**

Jack Bailey (Yogscast Art Team)

### **Special Thanks**

Thank you to all the Yogscast for everything you do, with special mention to;

*   Lewis, Simon and Duncan, for the original Jaffa Factory series, without which this mod wouldn't exist
*   Harry and Nick, for all your work with us and for coordinating Jaffa Factory 2
